programme.title: The Big Trees (1952
programme.desc: A standard action movie, and not a very good one. “The Big Trees” is a Western, set in northern California around 1900. The main character is Jim Fallon, a timber baron who has recently moved to the state from Wisconsin. Fallon’s motive is to take advantage of a new law which will allow him to stake a claim to the area’s dense forests. Fallon especially has his eyes on the giant redwoods, the world’s largest (and among its oldest) trees which he believes will net him a handsome profit. There is, however, a problem. A religious community have made their home in the forest and are determined to save the trees…

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive S1E29 Double Fee
programme.desc: Josh Randall is hired to capture two outlaws at the same time, but complications arise when the criminals’ paths intersect and the bounty becomes more than a simple chase. Randall must rely on his experience, quick thinking, and marksmanship to bring both fugitives in safely.

programme.title: Forbidden Trails 1941
programme.desc: The Rough Riders ride again in Forbidden Trails! When Marshal Buck Roberts (Buck Jones) is gunned down and badly wounded, he refuses to quit the fight. With fellow lawmen Tim McCoy and Raymond Hatton at his side, the trio saddles up to take on a ruthless gang terrorizing the frontier. Packed with blazing six-gun action, camaraderie, and justice served Western-style, this thrilling chapter in the Rough Riders series delivers nonstop excitement.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade 1953
programme.desc: In Son of the Renegade, cowboy star Johnny Carpenter saddles up for a tale of legacy and justice. As the son of a notorious outlaw, he fights to escape the shadow of his father’s crimes and prove himself a man of honor. With outlaws closing in and the law on his trail, he takes a stand to defend the innocent and clear his name. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes drama, and frontier grit, this Western asks—can the son of a renegade carve out a destiny of his own?

programme.title: Billy The Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element.

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita

programme.title: Without Honors (1932) Colorized
programme.desc: “In Without Honors, cowboy star Richard Arlen rides into a frontier tangled in treachery and deceit. Framed for a crime he didn’t commit, he must fight to clear his name and expose the outlaws behind the scheme. With tense drama, blazing action, and a touch of romance, this early Western delivers a rugged tale of courage and justice won the hard way.

programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

Theo Ribbs breaks down the shotgun sports while Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Paul Sawyer, Nikki Boxler and Gabe Adair have a friendly sporting clays competition.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

programme.title: Alaska
programme.desc: Journey into the beautiful wilderness of Alaska through the photography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This art display film showcases their most stunning photographs of Americas last great wilderness - from breaching whales and misty mountains of the Inside Passage to the Grizzlies and soaring peaks of Denali National Park. This 60 minute film will give you new appreciation for the wilderness of the wild North. Accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack.

programme.title: Preview of Point Reyes & Oregon Coast

Experience the calming effect of the seashore paired with a beautiful soundtrack.

programme.title: Preview of Hawaii & The Caribbean

Available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv in the Moving Art Displays channel. To get instant access please visit www.NatureStream.tv

programme.title: Preview of Framed Matted Art Displays
programme.desc: This is a preview of a series of 15 of Elizabeth Carmels Fine Art Photographs matted like framed art pieces.The full 2 1/2 hour film displays each photograph for 10 minutes. To remain on one photograph press pause, follow the directions in our video "Displaying Fine Art Photographs on Your Apple TV and Roku. This display is shown on a Samsung Frame TV with a Burlwood Frame available at www.TheCarmelGallery.com

programme.title: Preview for "California's Wild Coast"
programme.desc: Soar with the seabirds over the wild and beautiful north coast of California. The rugged coastline of Mendocino is a vast wilderness full of wildlife, sea caves, bird colonies, and crashing waves that can only be fully appreciated from an aerial view. This 2.5 hour film is an exhilarating flight over this magnificent landscape. Soul stirring ambient music accompanies the spectacular cinematography of "Californias Wild Coast". The full film is available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv

programme.title: All In | Carissa And Lakey Face Their Final World Tour Battle In Perfect Honolua Bay
programme.desc: As Carissa Moore, Lakey Peterson, and the rest of the women of the WSL World Tour arrive to Honolua Bay, Maui, so too does one of the biggest swells in recent memory. For Carissa, who grew up in Hawaii, big waves come more naturally. For Lakey, a terrifying wipeout earlier in her career lingers in her mind as she sets out to clinch the world title in a surf-off with Stephanie Gilmore. Meanwhile, on the North Shore, Julian Wilson and Jordy Smith prepare for battle at the Banzai Pipeline.

programme.title: Wolves' Weddings | Brilliant Corners: Algeria, Episode 2
programme.desc: Sam, Lucy, and Erwan head to the naturally beautiful Kabyle region along with locals Dihya Nasri and Walid Assef. Once there, they surf some clean, cold, and completely uncrowded peelers and get some famous ice cream in Béjaïa, a market city known for its rich music scene, vibrant clothing, and incredible views of the Sapphire Coast. They then explore the stunning Cap Carbon headlands and learn about the native Berber culture and ancient Kabyle language.

programme.title: Refugees Welcome: A Story of Immigration to America's Heartland
programme.desc: Refugees Welcome documents how one Governor’s brave decision to welcome refugees during the Vietnam War had far reaching repercussions not only for the country but, generations later, for the fate of his own family.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown: Downtown Duels
programme.desc: Rob searches for secret rooms, blows off some steam and fire, and finds himself challenged to a duel when he ventures deep into Downtown Boston.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Stitch: Catch the Spirit of Adventure, From Mars to Marathons
programme.desc: They take to the skies and seas, hit the open road, or attempt to reunite with a loved one. This episode of Stitch inspires the adventurous spirit through those who have bravely charted their own paths.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge: Screenprinters Pull Paint with True Grit to Honor Old West
programme.desc: It’s time to saddle up as three Oklahoma natives pull themselves to victory creating original screen print deigns encapsulating the Old West. Do these makers have the true grit it takes to be Maker Nation Champion?
